youtube_title: Japan SHOCK the Netherlands 2-2 — From Behind TWICE | World Cup 2026
youtube_description: The Netherlands led twice in their World Cup 2026 Group F opener in Dallas — and Japan came back twice to steal a point. Van Dijk (51') and Summerville (64') for the Dutch; Nakamura (57') and Kamada's 88th-minute header for the Samurai Blue, who arrived on a five-game streak that included their first-ever win over England at Wembley. Generated graphics + voiceover. No footage. Your daily World Cup stories. #worldcup2026
instagram_caption: Japan just refused to lose. 🇯🇵 Down twice to the world's No.8 — level twice. Best Japan side ever, or did the Dutch bottle it? 👇 Subscribe for daily World Cup stories.
tiktok_caption: The Dutch led TWICE and still couldn't win 😳 Kamada's 88th-min header steals it for Japan. Best Japan team ever or did Oranje bottle it? #worldcup2026
